name: What if I told AI a different story about my car crash than to my lawyer?
description: Contradictions kill credibility—disclose to lawyer now.[1]

mainEntity.name: What if I told AI a different story about my car crash than to my lawyer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Contradictions kill credibility—disclose to lawyer now.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Inconsistencies become weapons in deposition or trial via discovery.[1] AI records prove contradictions.[1] Key factors: Speculations on fault or events are quotable; no deletion helps.[1] Disclose to your lawyer ASAP for damage control. Align your narrative professionally.
